transcript: I felt the earth on Monday The mold beneath my face And the form of a morning paper There for me to say Saw its face in a corner picture I recognized the name Could have not touched down anything the place I'd never see again It's a ship to a wicked world of pain Why doesn't it wait for us if you don't live? It's the same every day Help my pain, what can be saved? Where do you have to hold it? It's no world, it's world over It's the world we're through to find It's no world, it's world over Thank you. It's no world, it's one of us If the world wants to decide It's no world, it's one of us If the world wants to decide There's a wooden bridge Next to a handsome face And a president to fall for I'm a cheque and I'm a play And then all of us We'll be you next time.
